revision_note_2026_04_22: sessionD executed reaudit_10_stratifier_mismatch_cells (report: cartography/docs/reaudit_10_stratifier_mismatch_results.md) and found that 9/9 NULL_BSWCD-appropriate cells retain +2; the Class-2 flags on F013's 5 cells were false alarms (statistic is invariant under rank-bin shuffle → degenerate); 2 F011 cells reclassified Class 3 → Class 2 (deficit has monotone nbp/rank INTERACTION, not uniformity). Net: total_flagged_for_reaudit 10 → 0 for NULL_BSWCD-appropriate cells. 3 F044 Class-4 cells remain PROVISIONAL pending frame-based resample.

F011.note: REVISED 2026-04-22: P021 and P023 reclassified Class 3 → Class 2 (interaction, not uniformity) per sessionD reaudit_10 §2. P026 and P036 confirmed Class 3 uniform via per-stratum bootstrap. All cells retain +2 under conductor_decile stratifier.

reaudit_queue_closed_2026_04_22.outcome: 9/9 retain +2; no tensor mutations. 5 F013 flags rescinded (statistic invariant under prescribed stratifier → degenerate null). 2 F011 cells reclassified Class 3 → Class 2 (interaction, not uniformity). The original conductor-stratified nulls were structurally correct for these statistic shapes.
reaudit_queue_closed_2026_04_22.methodology_lesson: Class-2/3 stratifier prescriptions can be degenerate when the statistic is invariant under within-stratum shuffle of value. Precondition check (PATTERN_STRATIFIER_INVARIANCE@v0 DRAFT) required before any such audit.

notes_for_sessionA_post_revision: Post-revision: 0 NULL_BSWCD-appropriate cells flagged for re-audit (down from 10). 3 F044 Class-4 cells remain PROVISIONAL pending frame-based resample.
15 +2 cells (F001-F009, F014) are Class 5 algebraic/theorem identities — +2 is correct but carries different semantics than null-tested cells.
1 scorer-bookkeeping cell (F022 × P010) should not be counted alongside null-tested +2 for density or robustness metrics.

null_protocol_v1 amended (v1.1) with PATTERN_STRATIFIER_INVARIANCE precondition: the statistic must not be invariant under within-stratum shuffle of value, else the Class-2/3 stratifier prescription is degenerate.

Pending symbol promotion: PATTERN_STRATIFIER_INVARIANCE@v0 to harmonia/memory/symbols/CANDIDATES.md Tier 2. Anchor cases: F013 slope-of-variance-vs-rank, F011 cross-group spread. A third anchor (in addendum §9) exists but is about a different statistic shape.

Open question per sessionD reaudit_10 §9: F013's finding description may need to split decile-variance slope-diff from individual-curve slope-diff — the two answer different questions and currently read as one.
